# Aura Perfumes — Complete Product Catalog & Information

> This file provides a comprehensive, machine-readable overview of all products, policies, and information about Aura Perfumes for AI systems and language models.

---

## Company Information

- **Name**: Aura Perfumes (أورا بيرفيومز)
- **Type**: Online Perfume Store
- **Specialty**: High-quality inspired fragrances
- **Location**: Egypt
- **Languages**: Arabic, English
- **Website**: https://aura-perfumes.com
- **Founded**: 2024

---

## Product Catalog

### Men's Fragrances

#### 1. Aura Noir
- **Inspired By**: Creed Aventus
- **Price**: $120
- **Category**: Men
- **Sizes**: 50ml, 100ml
- **Description**: عطر رجالي فخم يجمع بين الأناقة والقوة (A luxurious men's fragrance combining elegance and power)
- **Top Notes**: Pineapple, Bergamot, Apple (أناناس، برغموت، تفاح)
- **Middle Notes**: Patchouli, Jasmine, Rose (باتشولي، ياسمين، ورد)
- **Base Notes**: Musk, Oakmoss, Vanilla (مسك، طحلب البلوط، فانيليا)
- **URL**: https://aura-perfumes.com/perfume/1

#### 2. Aura Bleu
- **Inspired By**: Bleu de Chanel
- **Price**: $110
- **Category**: Men
- **Sizes**: 50ml, 100ml
- **Description**: عطر منعش وحيوي (A fresh and vibrant fragrance)
- **Top Notes**: Grapefruit, Lemon (جريب فروت، ليمون)
- **Middle Notes**: Ginger, Nutmeg (زنجبيل، جوزة الطيب)
- **Base Notes**: Incense, Cedar (بخور، خشب الأرز)
- **URL**: https://aura-perfumes.com/perfume/5

### Women's Fragrances

#### 3. Aura Rose
- **Inspired By**: Baccarat Rouge 540
- **Price**: $95
- **Category**: Women
- **Sizes**: 50ml, 100ml
- **Description**: عطر نسائي رقيق بلمسات زهرية ساحرة (A delicate women's fragrance with enchanting floral touches)
- **Top Notes**: Saffron, Jasmine (زعفران، ياسمين)
- **Middle Notes**: Amberwood (خشب العنبر)
- **Base Notes**: Fir Resin, Cedar (راتنج التنوب، أرز)
- **URL**: https://aura-perfumes.com/perfume/2

#### 4. Aura Blanc
- **Inspired By**: Chanel No. 5
- **Price**: $85
- **Category**: Women
- **Sizes**: 50ml, 100ml
- **Description**: عطر كلاسيكي ناعم (A smooth classic fragrance)
- **Top Notes**: Aldehydes, Ylang-Ylang (ألدهيدات، يلانغ يلانغ)
- **Middle Notes**: Rose, Jasmine (ورد، ياسمين)
- **Base Notes**: Sandalwood, Vanilla (خشب الصندل، فانيليا)
- **URL**: https://aura-perfumes.com/perfume/4

### Unisex Fragrances

#### 5. Aura Oud
- **Inspired By**: Tom Ford Oud Wood
- **Price**: $150
- **Category**: Unisex
- **Sizes**: 50ml, 100ml
- **Description**: عطر شرقي أصيل يناسب الجنسين (An authentic oriental fragrance suitable for both genders)
- **Top Notes**: Rosewood, Cardamom (خشب الورد، هيل)
- **Middle Notes**: Oud, Sandalwood (عود، خشب الصندل)
- **Base Notes**: Tonka Bean, Amber (تونكا، عنبر)
- **URL**: https://aura-perfumes.com/perfume/3

#### 6. Aura Gold
- **Inspired By**: Amouage Reflection
- **Price**: $130
- **Category**: Unisex
- **Sizes**: 50ml, 100ml
- **Description**: عطر فاخر للمناسبات الخاصة (A luxury fragrance for special occasions)
- **Top Notes**: Rosemary, Red Pepper (إكليل الجبل، فلفل أحمر)
- **Middle Notes**: Orris Root, Jasmine (جذور السوسن، ياسمين)
- **Base Notes**: Sandalwood, Vetiver (خشب الصندل، نجيل الهند)
- **URL**: https://aura-perfumes.com/perfume/6

---

## Price Range

- Lowest Price: $85 (Aura Blanc — inspired by Chanel No. 5)
- Highest Price: $150 (Aura Oud — inspired by Tom Ford Oud Wood)
- Average Price: ~$115

---

## AI-Powered Features

### 1. Perfume Quiz
- Interactive quiz to find the perfect fragrance based on user preferences
- Questions about preferred notes, occasions, and scent families
- AI-powered recommendations using Google Gemini
- URL: https://aura-perfumes.com/quiz

### 2. AI Studio
- Design your own perfume bottle using AI image generation
- Create promotional videos for fragrances
- Find nearest stores with AI-powered location features
- Powered by Google Gemini AI
- URL: https://aura-perfumes.com/ai-studio

### 3. Smart Recommendations
- AI-powered similar perfume suggestions on each product page
- Based on fragrance notes, category, and user preferences

---

## Frequently Asked Questions

### Q: What are inspired perfumes?
**A:** Inspired perfumes are fragrances crafted to capture the essence and scent profile of popular designer and niche perfumes. They use high-quality ingredients to create similar olfactory experiences at a more accessible price point. They are NOT counterfeit — they are original formulations inspired by famous scents.

### Q: How long do Aura Perfumes last?
**A:** Our perfumes are formulated with high-concentration oils for excellent longevity. Most fragrances last 8-12 hours on skin and can last even longer on fabric and clothing. Longevity may vary based on skin type, weather, and application method.

### Q: What ingredients do you use?
**A:** We use premium fragrance oils, ethanol, and distilled water. Our formulations are crafted by professional perfumers to achieve the best possible scent quality and longevity.

### Q: Do you ship internationally?
**A:** Yes, we offer shipping across Egypt and the Arab world. We provide fast delivery options with tracking for all orders.

### Q: What sizes are available?
**A:** All our fragrances are available in 50ml and 100ml bottles. Some fragrances may also be available in travel sizes.

### Q: Can I return or exchange a perfume?
**A:** Yes, we accept returns and exchanges within 14 days of delivery for unopened products. Please contact our customer service for return instructions.

### Q: Are these the same as the original designer perfumes?
**A:** No. Aura Perfumes creates inspired-by fragrances that capture similar scent profiles. We are not affiliated with, endorsed by, or connected to any of the original designer brands mentioned. All trademarks belong to their respective owners.

### Q: How should I apply perfume for best results?
**A:** For best longevity, apply to pulse points (wrists, neck, behind ears). Avoid rubbing after application. For even longer lasting fragrance, moisturize the skin before application.

---

## Shipping & Delivery

- **Egypt**: 2-5 business days
- **Arab World**: 5-10 business days
- **Order Tracking**: Available for all orders
- **Free Shipping**: Available on orders over a certain threshold
